title: We Give Thee But Thine Own

lyrics.v1: We give Thee but Thine own, Whate'er the gift may be; All that we have is Thine alone, A trust, O Lord, from Thee.
lyrics.v2: May we Thy bounties thus As stewards true receive, And gladly, as Thou blessest us, To Thee our firstfruits give.
lyrics.v3: O hearts are bruised and dead, And homes are bare and cold, And lambs for whom the Shepherd bled Are straying from the fold.
lyrics.v4: To comfort and to bless, To find a balm for woe, To tend the lone and fatherless Is angels' work below.
lyrics.v5: The captive to release, To God the lost to bring, To teach the way of life and peace? It is a Christlike thing.
